package service

import (
	ctxpkg "context"
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"
)

type RequestKey string

var userKey = "user_client"

type Worker struct {
	ctx ctxpkg.Context
}

func LoadPatient(db *sql.DB, ctx ctxpkg.Context, patientID string) error {
	ctx = ctxpkg.WithValue(ctx, "request_id", patientID)
	ctx = ctxpkg.WithValue(ctx, userKey, &http.Client{})
	_, err := db.QueryContext(ctx, "SELECT 1")
	return err
}

func Handle(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	ctx := r.Context()
	go func() {
		publishAudit(ctx)
	}()
	_, _ = w.Write([]byte("ok"))
}

func publishAudit(ctx ctxpkg.Context) {}
